subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God, from the right hand of the Throne, hath verily been raised up in truth, and by it are drawn those who have detached themselves from all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله عن یمین العرش کان علی الحق مرفوعا و استجذب منه الذین انقطعوا عن
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
